sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { LineChart, Line, PieChart, Pie, Cell, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; import PlatformLayout from '../components/platform/PlatformLayout'; import { adminReportsData } from '../data/mockData'; export default function AdminReports() { const [timeRange, setTimeRange] = useState('6months'); return (
{/* Header */}

Analytics & Reports

Platform performance and business metrics

{['7days', '30days', '6months', '1year'].map(range => ( ))}
{/* Key Metrics */}

Total Revenue

$284.9K

↑ 8.4% vs last period

Avg. Test Value

$1,280

Per completed test

Avg. Completion

91%

↑ 9% vs last period

Churn Rate

2.3%

↓ 0.5% vs last period

{/* Charts */}
{/* Revenue Trend */}

Revenue Trend

`$${(v/1000).toFixed(0)}K`} /> [`$${v.toLocaleString()}`, 'Revenue']} contentStyle={{ borderRadius: '10px', border: '1px solid #e2e8f0', fontSize: 12 }} />
{/* Test Completion Rate */}

Test Completion Rate

[`${v}%`, 'Completion']} contentStyle={{ borderRadius: '10px', border: '1px solid #e2e8f0', fontSize: 12 }} />
{/* Test Type Distribution */}

Tests by Type

`${name} ${(percent * 100).toFixed(0)}%`} outerRadius={80} fill="#8884d8" dataKey="value" > {adminReportsData.testTypeDistribution.map((entry, index) => ( ))}
{/* Satisfaction Scores */}

User Satisfaction Scores

{adminReportsData.userSatisfaction.map((item) => (
{item.metric} {item.score}/5.0
))}
{/* Performance Summary */}

Performance Summary

Platform Reliability

Uptime 99.97%
Avg Response Time 245ms
Error Rate 0.03%

User Engagement

DAU 24,583
MAU 412,847
Retention (30d) 87%

Quality Metrics

Avg Test Quality 8.7/10
Bug Detection Rate 94%
False Positives 2%
); }
